commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=60c510875b99d986bf45612dffc8f18a58297dba)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates managed npm install-record recovery, post-core update convergence peer relinking, and plugin payload smoke checks for `openclaw` peer dependencies.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence executed reproduction was established in this read-only review. Source inspection shows a clear case: a managed npm plugin declaring `peerDependencies.openclaw` with a stale real `node_modules/openclaw` directory is skipped by repair but passes the proposed smoke check.
commands.review_followup: Keep this in human PR review because the branch needs a focused validation fix plus contributor-supplied real behavior proof, which automation cannot supply for the contributor's setup.

target.title: fix(update): repair managed npm plugin peers
target.body:
## Summary
- recover managed npm install records from the actual managed package when a persisted npm record points at the same path but an older version
- relink managed npm `openclaw` peer dependencies during post-core convergence before payload smoke checks run
- fail payload smoke checks when an active plugin declares an `openclaw` peer but has no resolvable local host-package link

## Testing
- `node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/plugins/installed-plugin-index-records.test.ts src/cli/update-cli/plugin-payload-validation.test.ts src/cli/update-cli/post-core-plugin-convergence.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.src.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/test-src.tsbuildinfo`
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/cli/update-cli/plugin-payload-validation.ts src/cli/update-cli/plugin-payload-validation.test.ts src/cli/update-cli/post-core-plugin-convergence.ts src/cli/update-cli/post-core-plugin-convergence.test.ts src/plugins/installed-plugin-index-record-reader.ts src/plugins/installed-plugin-index-records.test.ts`
target.author: fuller-stack-dev

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
